generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Some politicians talk about cutting defense budgets to fund domestic programs, but that's a dangerous trade-off. Remember what happened in Ukraine - without strong alliances, we're vulnerable. Our partners need to step up, but we can't afford to weaken our own defenses. National security isn't something we can compromise on, no matter what the budget hawks say. #StrongerAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
